description.zh: 处理幂等、重试、消息一致性与跨服务状态协调。
description.en: Idempotency, retries, message consistency, and cross-service coordination.

description.zh: 浅析分布式系统的理论基础。
description.en: The basic thories of distributed system.

description.zh: 从基础语法、源代码以及生态等角度对 Rust 语言进行的探索。
description.en: An exploration of the Rust language from the perspectives of basic syntax, source code, and its ecosystem.

description.zh: 从基础语法、源代码以及生态等角度对 Go 语言进行的探索。
description.en: An exploration of the Go language from the perspectives of basic syntax, source code, and its ecosystem.

summary.zh: 从 FLP 不可能性出发，介绍异步分布式系统中共识问题的理论边界。
summary.en: Starting from the FLP impossibility result, we introduces the theoretical boundary of consensus in asynchronous distributed systems.
